---
title: "This Website"
date: 2026-05-01
description: "Building and iterating on a personal site with Quarto — the decisions, trade-offs, and setup."
categories: [Quarto, web]
---

## Overview

This site is built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org), a scientific and technical publishing system based on Pandoc. It deploys automatically to GitHub Pages via GitHub Actions.

**Status:** Live

## Why Quarto?

Quarto makes it easy to mix prose, code, and output in a single document. For a site that will eventually include data analyses and code walkthroughs, that felt like the right foundation.

## Structure

```
.
├── _quarto.yml       # site config and sidebar
├── index.qmd         # landing page
├── about.qmd         # about me
├── writing/          # essays and notes
│   └── index.qmd     # auto-generated listing
└── projects/         # project write-ups
    └── index.qmd     # auto-generated listing
```

## Deployment

The site renders to `docs/` and GitHub Pages serves from that folder on the main branch.

---

*More detail coming soon.*
